assertions.reason: Interaction depth is present: hovering an offering card reveals structural detail (border/background shift plus geometric terminal lines via pseudo-elements), not just a color swap.
evidence: Computed style delta on first .offering-card: borderColor rgb(214,208,196) -> rgb(43,40,36), background rgb(245,240,230) -> rgb(235,229,217), ::before width 0px -> 78.1875px and opacity 0 -> 1, ::after width 0px -> 78.1875px and opacity 0 -> 1
Browser errors check: none (agent-browser errors returned no page errors)

assertions.reason: Mobile responsiveness at 375px is valid across all pages; navigation is usable via the menu, content remains readable, and no horizontal scrolling was detected.
evidence: Mobile nav opened with all six links visible: .factory/validation/design-system/user-testing/flows/evidence/ds-components-home-mobile-menu-open.png
Per-page viewport checks at 375px: /, /work, /approach, /services, /about, /contact each reported innerWidth=375 and doc/body scrollWidth=375 (horizontalScroll=false)
HTTP status checks: curl returned 200 for /, /work, /approach, /services, /about, /contact

assertions.reason: Distinct component patterns are present and structurally clear for offerings/services, productions/blocks, and discipline descriptions.
evidence: DOM pattern counts: .offering-card=7 on /services, .production-block=6 on /work, .discipline-block=6 on /approach

frictions: agent-browser snapshot/find encountered duplicate 'Menu' controls due an external overlay toolbar; resolved by targeting '.mobile-nav-toggle' selector directly.
An on-screen floating toolbar intermittently overlapped page content in screenshots; core UI remained inspectable and assertions were still verifiable.
